description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is primarily white with bold red and yellow accents on the wings, tail, and nose, giving it a sporty appearance. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angles. The landing gear is fixed in a tricycle arrangement, with two main wheels and a single nose wheel. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed, featuring a clear canopy and side windows. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration.
description: A small, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with red and yellow accents, fixed tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Three-quarter front view showing the red high-mounted wings, nose propeller, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the wide wingspan, nose propeller, and symmetrical landing gear.
description_view_2: Three-quarter rear view displaying the tail design, high wings, and rear fuselage details.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the tail assembly, main landing gear, and the straight wing alignment.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single-seat.
